title: raphanistrum innocuum var. segetum
intro: Raphanistrum innocuum var. segetum, also known as wild radish, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Raphanistrum innocuum var. segetum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as a natural remedy for skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
